Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x300B "PSIWARRIOR-300B" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Psi Warrior.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Patched the LDA $8305 instruction at $8011 to be JMP $0B00 instead. A tiny routine to check the port 2 fire button has been placed at $0B00, which if detected, skips the rather long intro.
